title: Grave Robber
description: A classic take on the Gravestone Mod, adding a mini fight to retrieve your items.
body:
# Grave Robber

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SIKRGQRK/images/3871dc9df96c833e4b72874307b844ff4526a025.png)

When you die, a skeleton spawns right on the spot wearing your armor, swinging your weapon, and holding every item and all experience you had. Defeat it to recover everything in one go.

A classic take on the old gravestones mod, but a bit more difficult.

## Features
- **Player-named skeleton** appears at the players death location
- Carries the players full inventory upon dead
- Never despawns, giving you a fair rematch
- Wears your armor and holds the item you were last holding.

## How it works

Die, kill the skeleton guarding your items, retrieve back all your items.
